`scripts/ticket_supervisor.py:64` | `project_root=PROJECT_ROOT` derivado via `__file__` | Punto de entrada del launcher. |\n34: | `bus/supervisor.py` | `project_root` (Inyectado via constructor) | Limpio. Usa la inyeccion para instanciar `EventBus`. |\n35: | `bus/review_bridge.py` | `project_root` y `event_bus` (Inyectados) | Limpio. |\n36: | `bus/event_bus.py` | `runtime_dir` (Inyectado via constructor) | Limpio. |\n37: | `agent_system/scripts/project_paths.py` | `project_dir` externo. | Es el resolver de rutas oficial de los scripts de instalacion. Su rol en el runtime de `orquestador_de_agentes` actualmente es nulo, pero podria ser el patron a seguir. |\n38: \n39: ## Fase 3: Diseno del contrato `project_root`\n40: \n41: Para lograr el modelo \"Motor vs Destino\", el contrato se establece asi:\n42: \n43: 1. **CLI / Entry points explicitos**: Los scripts que inician el sistema (`agent_controller.py`, `ticket_supervisor.py`, `manager_review_bridge.py`) deben recibir la ruta destino via parametro de linea de comandos (e.g. `--project-root <RutaDestino>`).\n44: 2. **Variable de Entorno (`AGENT_PROJECT_ROOT`)**: Al invocar agentes que ejecutan *hooks* (e.g., `stop_hook.py`, `completion_checker.py`), la CLI no es posible porque el hook es invocado por el modelo. Estos hooks deben depender de una variable de entorno inyectada desde el launcher o basarse directamente en `os.getcwd()` asumiendo que el modelo opera desde el repo destino.\n45: 3. **Consolidacion `project_paths.py`**: Extender su uso o crear una configuracion central inyectable para que todo script, en vez de definir `AGENT_DIR = PROJECT_ROOT / \".agent\"`, use un helper.\n46: \n47: ## Fase 4: Entregable para WP-2026-122\n48: \n49: **Lista exacta de `Files Likely Touched` (Rutas Literales):**\n50: \n51: **Codigo Core:**\n52: - `.agent/agent_controller.py`\n53: - `.agent/agents_config.py`\n54: - `.agent/completion_checker.py`\n55: - `.agent/completion_common.py`\n56: - `.agent/session_tracker.py`\n57: - `.agent/hooks/stop_hook.py`\n58: - `.agent/runtime/memory/memory_helpers.py`\n59: - `scripts/manager_review_bridge.py`\n60: - `scripts/local_audit.py`\n61: - `scripts/ticket_supervisor.py`\n62: - `scripts/ticket_activity_monitor.py`\n63: - `scripts/run_gates_dispatch.py`\n64: - `runtime/ui_state_projector.py`\n65: \n66: **Archivos de entorno / Launcher:**\n67: - `scripts/launch_agent_terminals.ps1`\n68: \n69: **Aclaracion de scope:**\n70: Como se confirmo en auditoria, los modulos `bus/event_bus.py`, `bus/supervisor.py` y `bus/review_bridge.py` **NO necesitan cambios internos** pues ya aceptan el contexto por parametro inyectado de sus call-sites.\n71: \n72: **Riesgos y Orden de Implementacion Sugerido:**\n73: 1. Modificar primero el fallback de `PROJECT_ROOT` en variables de entorno (Hooks primero).\n74: 2. Parametrizar los scripts core `ticket_supervisor.py` y `manager_review_bridge.py`.\n75: 3. Ajustar `launch_agent_terminals.ps1` para que alimente el nuevo parametro `--project-root` apuntando al workspace del agente destino.\n76: 4. AGENT_PROJECT_ROOT environment variable (set by entry points after parsing --project-root)\n10:     2. AGENT_PROJECT_ROOT environment variable (if set and non-empty)\n44:         2. Derived from this module's location (runtime/project_root.py -> parent)\n45: \n46:     Returns:\n47:         Absolute Path to the project root directory.\n48: \n49:     Note:\n50:         Entry points that accept --project-root should export the value to\n51:         AGENT_PROJECT_ROOT environment variable immediately after parsing,\n52:         before importing any modules that depend on the project root.\n53:         This ensures a single channel of propagation (env var) rather than\n54:         parallel mechanisms.\n55:     \"\"\"\n56:     # Check environment variable first (set by entry points after CLI parsing)\n57:     env_root = os.environ.get(\"AGENT_PROJECT_ROOT\", \"\").strip()\n58:     if env_root:\n59:         return Path(env_root).resolve()\n60: \n61:     # Fallback: derive from this module's location\n62:     # runtime/project_root.py -> runtime/ -> project root\n63:     return Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent\n64: \n65: \n66: @lru_cache(maxsize=1)\n67: def get_agent_dir() -> Path:\n68:     \"\"\"\n69:     Get the .agent/ directory path.\n70: \n71:     Before: Requires resolve_project_root() to be available.\n72:     During: Calls resolve_project_root() and appends \".agent\".\n73:     After: Returns absolute Path to .agent/ directory, cached.\n74: \n75:     Returns:\n76:         Absolute Path to the .agent/ directory.\n77:     \"\"\"\n78:     return resolve_project_root() / \".agent\"\n79: \n80: \n81: @lru_cache(maxsize=1)\n82: def get_collab_dir() -> Path:\n83:     \"\"\"\n84:     Get the .agent/collaboration/ directory path.\n85: \n86:     Before: Requires get_agent_dir() to be available.\n87:     During: Calls get_agent_dir() and appends \"collaboration\".\n88:     After: Returns absolute Path to .agent/collaboration/ directory, cached.\n89: \n90:     Returns:\n91:         Absolute Path to the .agent/collaboration/ directory.\n92:     \"\"\"\n93:     return get_agent_dir() / \"collaboration\"\n94: \n95: \n96: @lru_cache(maxsize=1)\n97: def get_runtime_dir() -> Path:\n98:     \"\"\"\n99:     Get the .agent/runtime/ directory path.\n100: \n101:     Before: Requires get_agent_dir() to be available.\n102:     During: Calls get_agent_dir() and appends \"runtime\".\n103:     After: Returns absolute Path to .agent/runtime/ directory, cached.\n104: \n105:     Returns:\n106:         Absolute Path to the .agent/runtime/ directory.\n107:     \"\"\"\n108:     return get_agent_dir() / \"runtime\"\n109: \n110: \n111: @lru_cache(maxsize=1)\n112: def get_context_dir() -> Path:\n113:     \"\"\"\n114:     Get the .agent/context/ directory path.\n115: \n116:     Before: Requires get_agent_dir() to be available.\n117:     During: Calls get_agent_dir() and appends \"context\".\n118:     After: Returns absolute Path to .agent/context/ directory, cached.\n119: \n120:     Returns:\n121:         Absolute Path to .agent/context/ directory.\n122:     \"\"\"\n123:     return get_agent_dir() / \"context\"\n124: \n125: \n126: @lru_cache(maxsize=1)\n127: def get_scripts_dir() -> Path:\n128:     \"\"\"\n129:     Get the scripts/ directory path.\n130: \n131:     Before: Requires resolve_project_root() to be available.\n132:     During: Calls resolve_project_root() and appends \"scripts\".\n133:     After: Returns absolute Path to scripts/ directory, cached.\n134: \n135:     Returns:\n136:         Absolute Path to scripts/ directory.\n137:     \"\"\"\n138:     return resolve_project_root() / \"scripts\"\n139: \n140: \n141: def clear_cache() -> None:\n142:     \"\"\"\n143:     Clear all cached path resolutions.\n144: \n145:     Before: Requires no state.\n146:     During: Clears lru_cache for all cached functions.\n147:     After: Next call to any resolver will recompute the value.\n148: \n149:     Use this only in testing scenarios where you need to simulate\n150:     environment changes between calls.\n151:     \"\"\"\n152:     resolve_project_root.cache_clear()\n153:     get_agent_dir.cache_clear()\n154:     get_collab_dir.cache_clear()\n155:     get_runtime_dir.cache_clear()\n156:     get_context_dir.cache_clear()\n157:     get_scripts_dir.cache_clear()\n158: \n159: \n160: # ============================================================================\n161: # BACKWARD COMPATIBILITY: Lazy constants for gradual migration\n162: # ============================================================================\n163: # These are provided for modules that haven't been migrated to deferred access\n164: # yet. They are computed at first access, not at import time.\n165: \n166: \n167: class _LazyPaths:\n168:     \"\"\"Lazy path resolver for backward compatibility during migration.\"\"\"\n169: \n170:     def __init__(self) -> None:\n171:         self._project_root: Path | None = None\n172:         self._agent_dir: Path | None = None\n173:         self._collab_dir: Path | None = None\n174:         self._runtime_dir: Path | None = None\n175:         self._context_dir: Path | None = None\n176:         self._scripts_dir: Path | None = None\n177: \n178:     @property\n179:     def project_root(self) -> Path:\n180:         \"\"\"Lazy project_root for backward compatibility.\"\"\"\n181:         if self._project_root is None:\n182:             self._project_root = resolve_project_root()\n183:         return self._project_root\n184: \n185:     @property\n186:     def agent_dir(self) -> Path:\n187:         \"\"\"Lazy agent_dir for backward compatibility.\"\"\"\n188:         if self._agent_dir is None:\n189:             self._agent_dir = get_agent_dir()\n190:         return self._agent_dir\n191: \n192:     @property\n193:     def collab_dir(self) -> Path:\n194:         \"\"\"Lazy collab_dir for backward compatibility.\"\"\"\n195:         if self._collab_dir is None:\n196:             self._collab_dir = get_collab_dir()\n197:         return self._collab_dir\n198: \n199:     @property\n200:     def runtime_dir(self) -> Path:\n201:         \"\"\"Lazy runtime_dir for backward compatibility.\"\"\"\n202:         if self._runtime_dir is None:\n203:             self._runtime_dir = get_runtime_dir()\n204:         return self._runtime_dir\n205: \n206:     @property\n207:     def context_dir(self) -> Path:\n208:         \"\"\"Lazy context_dir for backward compatibility.\"\"\"\n209:         if self._context_dir is None:\n210:             self._context_dir = get_context_dir()\n211:         return self._context_dir\n212: \n213:     @property\n214:     def scripts_dir(self) -> Path:\n215:         \"\"\"Lazy scripts_dir for backward compatibility.\"\"\"\n216:         if self._scripts_dir is None:\n217:             self._scripts_dir = get_scripts_dir()\n218:         return self._scripts_dir\n219: \n220: \n221: # Singleton instance for backward compatibility\n222: lazy_paths = _LazyPaths()\n\n(End of file - total 222 lines)\n</content>","metadata":{"preview":"\"\"\"\nProject Root Resolution Module - Central contract for WP-2026-122.\n\nThis module provides a single source of truth for resolving the project root\npath, supporting both the default motor repository and external destination\nworkspaces via environment variable injection.\n\nPrecedence (effective):\n    1. AGENT_PROJECT_ROOT environment variable (set by entry points after parsing --project-root)\n    2. Derived from Path(__file__) (defaults to motor repository)\n\nUsage:\n    from runtime.project_root import resolve_project_root, get_agent_dir, get_collab_dir\n\n    root = resolve_project_root()  # Path to project root\n    agent_dir = get_agent_dir()    # Path to .agent/ directory\n    collab_dir = get_collab_dir()  # Path to .agent/collaboration/ directory\n\nDesign:\n    - Import-safe: no side effects at import time","truncated":false,"loaded":[]},"title":"runtime\\project_root.py","time":{"start":1779388343651,"end":1779388343659}},"metadata":{"openai":{"itemId":"fc_04b38c48366f62a5016a0f4f86b52c8191a7a6981d3aba2ffe"}},"id":"prt_e4bcf6542001IxmQWA8FlD3Qry","sessionID":"ses_1b430cff0ffeQrpJh4nK8aIvii","messageID":"msg_e4bcf30fa001Y7hOutbUVxxPkh"}}

{"type":"tool_use","timestamp":1779388343701,"sessionID":"ses_1b430cff0ffeQrpJh4nK8aIvii","part":{"type":"tool","tool":"read","callID":"call_DKxiB89Bu7ciFPwFOlYiHALW","state":{"status":"completed","input":{"filePath":"C:\\Users\\fdl\\Proyectos_Python\\z_scripts\\orquestador_de_agentes\\.agent\\hooks\\stop_hook.py","offset":1,"limit":220},"output":"<path>C:\\Users\\fdl\\Proyectos_Python\\z_scripts\\orquestador_de_agentes\\.agent\\hooks\\stop_hook.py</path>\n<type>file</type>\n<content>\n1: \"\"\"\n2: Stop hook for completion verification.\n3: \n4: WP-2026-122: Uses runtime.project_root for dynamic project root resolution.\n5: \"\"\"\n6: from __future__ import annotations\n7: \n8: from pathlib import Path\n9: \n10: from completion_common import (\n11:     check_execution_summary,\n12:     check_tasks_completed,\n13: )\n14: \n15: \n16: # WP-2026-122: Deferred path resolution via runtime.project_root\n17: try:\n18:     from runtime.project_root import get_collab_dir, resolve_project_root\n19: except ImportError:\n20:     # Fallback if runtime.project_root not available\n21:     get_collab_dir = None\n22:     resolve_project_root = None\n23: \n24: COLLAB_DIR = (\n25:     get_collab_dir()\n26:     if get_collab_dir is not None\n27:     else Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent / \"collaboration\"\n28: )\n29: PROJECT_ROOT = (\n30:     resolve_project_root()\n31:     if resolve_project_root is not None\n32:     else Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent\n33: )\n34: \n35: # Deferred path resolution for collaboration files\n36: EXEC_LOG = COLLAB_DIR / \"execution_log.md\"\n37: WORK_PLAN = COLLAB_DIR / \"work_plan.md\"\n38: REVIEW_QUEUE = COLLAB_DIR / \"review_queue.md\"\n39: \n40: \n41: def check_all_phases_complete(log_status: str) -> bool:\n42:     \"\"\"Check if all phases are complete for the given log status.\"\"\"\n43:     if log_status.upper() in {\"READY_FOR_REVIEW\", \"COMPLETED\"}:\n44:         return True\n45: \n46:     # For IN_PROGRESS, check if all tasks are completed\n47:     return check_tasks_completed(WORK_PLAN, log_status)\n48: \n49: \n50: def check_execution_log_complete(log_status: str) -> bool:\n51:     \"\"\"Check if execution log is complete.\"\"\"\n52:     return check_execution_summary(EXEC_LOG, log_status)\n53: \n54: \n55: def check_tests_passing() -> bool:\n56:     \"\"\"Check if tests are passing.\"\"\"\n57:     from completion_common import check_quality_gates\n58: \n59:     gates = check_quality_gates(PROJECT_ROOT)\n60:     return gates.get(\"tests\", False)\n\n(End of file - total 60 lines)\n</content>","metadata":{"preview":"\"\"\"\nStop hook for completion verification.\n\nWP-2026-122: Uses runtime.project_root for dynamic project root resolution.\n\"\"\"\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\nfrom completion_common import (\n    check_execution_summary,\n    check_tasks_completed,\n)\n\n\n# WP-2026-122: Deferred path resolution via runtime.project_root\ntry:\n    from runtime.project_root import get_collab_dir, resolve_project_root\nexcept ImportError:\n    # Fallback if runtime.project_root not available","truncated":false,"loaded":[]},"title":".agent\\hooks\\stop_hook.py","time":{"start":1779388343690,"end":1779388343700}},"metadata":{"openai":{"itemId":"fc_04b38c48366f62a5016a0f4f86b5488191ab5cccf4ecccbc29"}},"id":"prt_e4bcf6583001s4x78sWuOl7nM1","sessionID":"ses_1b430cff0ffeQrpJh4nK8aIvii","messageID":"msg_e4bcf30fa001Y7hOutbUVxxPkh"}}
{"type":"tool_use","timestamp":1779388343704,"sessionID":"ses_1b430cff0ffeQrpJh4nK8aIvii","part":{"type":"tool","tool":"read","callID":"call_I15yErMeMNQde9kCy1LQHPlH","state":{"status":"completed","input":{"filePath":"C:\\Users\\fdl\\Proyectos_Python\\z_scripts\\orquestador_de_agentes\\.agent\\agent_controller.py","offset":1,"limit":220},"output":"<path>C:\\Users\\fdl\\Proyectos_Python\\z_scripts\\orquestador_de_agentes\\.agent\\agent_controller.py</path>\n<type>file</type>\n<content>\n1: # ruff: noqa: S603,S607\n2: \"\"\"\n3: Agent Controller v5 - Sistema Multi-Agente\n4: ==========================================\n5: Orquestador con:\n6: - Hook System (pre-action, post-tool y stop hooks)\n7: - Native Claude Code hooks (PostToolUse, PreCompact, Stop, SubagentStop)\n8: - Completion Verification antes de review\n9: - Quality Gates extendidos\n10: - Session Recovery\n11: - Project Map y estado del workflow\n12: \n13: Uso:\n14:     python .agent/agent_controller.py              # Ver estado y turno actual\n15:     python .agent/agent_controller.py --json       # Output en JSON\n16:     python .agent/agent_controller.py --skip-gates # Saltar Quality Gates\n17:     python .agent/agent_controller.py --archive    # Archivar notificaciones antiguas\n18:     python .agent/agent_controller.py --validate   # Solo validar archivos de estado\n19:     python .agent/agent_controller.py --strict     # Modo estricto (bloquea si falla)\n20:     python .agent/agent_controller.py --bootstrap-ticket # Emitir STATE_CHANGED inicial para el ticket activo\n21:     python .agent/agent_controller.py --project-root /path/to/destino  # Operar sobre workspace externo\n22: \"\"\"\n23: \n24: # Fix encoding issues on Windows\n25: import codecs\n26: import json\n27: import os\n28: import re\n29: import subprocess\n30: import sys\n31: from datetime import datetime, timezone\n32: from pathlib import Path\n33: \n34: \n35: if sys.platform == \"win32\":\n36:     sys.stdout = codecs.getwriter(\"utf-8\")(sys.stdout.buffer)\n37:     sys.stderr = codecs.getwriter(\"utf-8\")(sys.stderr.buffer)\n38: \n39: # Fix imports when run as script (not as package)\n40: # WP-2026-122: project_root is now resolved dynamically via runtime.project_root\n41: _AGENT_DIR = Path(__file__).parent.resolve()\n42: _PROJECT_ROOT_DERIVED = _AGENT_DIR.parent\n43: for _path in (str(_PROJECT_ROOT_DERIVED), str(_AGENT_DIR)):\n44:     if _path not in sys.path:\n45:         sys.path.insert(0, _path)\n46: \n47: # WP-2026-122: Import project_root module for dynamic path resolution\n48: # Entry points set AGENT_PROJECT_ROOT env var after parsing --project-root\n49: # Import AFTER sys.path setup to ensure runtime/ is importable\n50: from runtime.project_root import (\n51:     get_agent_dir,\n52:     get_collab_dir,\n53:     get_context_dir,\n54:     resolve_project_root,\n55: )\n56: \n57: # ============================================================================\n58: # IMPORTS: HOOK SYSTEM, SESSION TRACKER & COMPLETION CHECKER\n59: # ============================================================================\n60: try:\n61:     from hooks import registry as hook_registry\n62:     from hooks.post_tool_hook import post_tool_hook\n63:     from hooks.pre_action_hook import pre_action_hook\n64:     from hooks.stop_hook import stop_hook\n65: \n66:     HOOKS_AVAILABLE = True\n67:     hook_registry.register(\"pre_action\", pre_action_hook)\n68:     hook_registry.register(\"post_tool\", post_tool_hook)\n69:     hook_registry.register(\"stop\", stop_hook)\n70: except ImportError:\n71:     HOOKS_AVAILABLE = False\n72:     hook_registry = None\n73: \n74: try:\n75:     from session_tracker import recover_session, save_session, show_recovery_hint\n76: \n77:     SESSION_TRACKER_AVAILABLE = True\n78: except ImportError:\n79:     SESSION_TRACKER_AVAILABLE = False\n80: \n81: try:\n82:     from completion_checker import check_completion, show_completion_report\n83: \n84:     COMPLETION_CHECKER_AVAILABLE = True\n85: except ImportError:\n86:     COMPLETION_CHECKER_AVAILABLE = False\n87: \n88: try:\n89:     from bus.event_bus import EventBus\n90:     from bus.utils import count_trailing_changes\n91: \n92:     BUS_AVAILABLE = True\n93: except ImportError:\n94:     BUS_AVAILABLE = False\n95:     EventBus = None\n96:     count_trailing_changes = None\n97: \n98: # ============================================================================\n99: # PATH CONFIGURATION - WP-2026-122: Deferred resolution via project_root module\n100: # ============================================================================\n101: # Paths now resolved dynamically via runtime.project_root functions\n102: \n103: \n104: # Deferred path resolution - no longer fixed at import time\n105: SCRIPT_DIR = Path(__file__).parent\n106: PROJECT_ROOT = resolve_project_root()\n107: AGENT_DIR = get_agent_dir()\n108: COLLAB_DIR = get_collab_dir()\n109: CONTEXT_DIR = get_context_dir()\n110: \n111: # State files\n112: WORK_PLAN = COLLAB_DIR / \"work_plan.md\"\n113: EXEC_LOG = COLLAB_DIR / \"execution_log.md\"\n114: REVIEW_QUEUE = COLLAB_DIR / \"review_queue.md\"\n115: NOTIFICATIONS = COLLAB_DIR / \"notifications.md\"\n116: TURN_FILE = COLLAB_DIR / \"TURN.md\"\n117: STATE_FILE = COLLAB_DIR / \"STATE.md\"\n118: PROJECT_MAP = CONTEXT_DIR / \"project_map.md\"\n119: ARCHIVE_DIR = COLLAB_DIR / \"archive\"\n120: AGENTS_CONFIG_PATH = AGENT_DIR / \"config\" / \"agents.json\"\n121: \n122: # Archive configuration\n123: MAX_NOTIFICATIONS_SIZE_KB = 50\n124: MAX_NOTIFICATION_ENTRIES = 20\n125: \n126: # WP-2026-106 hotfix: HUMAN_GATE escalation threshold. Single source of truth\n127: # is manager_review.max_attempts in agents.json (shared with bus/review_bridge.py).\n128: # Fallback used only if config is missing or unreadable.\n129: HUMAN_GATE_REJECTION_FALLBACK = 5\n130: \n131: \n132: def get_human_gate_threshold() -> int:\n133:     \"\"\"Return the consecutive-CHANGES count that escalates a ticket to HUMAN_GATE.\n134: \n135:     Reads manager_review.max_attempts from agents.json so both this controller\n136:     and bus/review_bridge.py escalate on the same number. Falls back to\n137:     HUMAN_GATE_REJECTION_FALLBACK if the config is absent or malformed.\n138:     \"\"\"\n139:     try:\n140:         cfg = json.loads(AGENTS_CONFIG_PATH.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n141:         value = int(cfg.get(\"manager_review\", {}).get(\"max_attempts\"))\n142:         return value if value > 0 else HUMAN_GATE_REJECTION_FALLBACK\n143:     except (OSError, ValueError, TypeError, json.JSONDecodeError):\n144:         return HUMAN_GATE_REJECTION_FALLBACK\n145: \n146: \n147: # Configuracion de comprobaciones\n148: MAX_FILES_CIRCULAR_CHECK = 50\n149: \n150: # Estados validos para validacion\n151: VALID_PLAN_STATES = {\n152:     \"DRAFT\",\n153:     \"IN_PLANNING\",\n154:     \"APPROVED\",\n155:     \"IN_REVIEW\",\n156:     \"COMPLETED\",\n157:     \"N/A\",\n158: }\n159: VALID_LOG_STATES = {\n160:     \"PENDING\",\n161:     \"IN_PROGRESS\",\n162:     \"BLOCKED\",\n163:     \"READY_FOR_REVIEW\",\n164:     # WP-2026-106: HUMAN_GATE and READY_TO_CLOSE are real terminal-adjacent\n165:     # states emitted by bus/state_machine.py; the validator must accept them.\n166:     \"HUMAN_GATE\",\n167:     \"READY_TO_CLOSE\",\n168:     \"COMPLETED\",\n169:     \"N/A\",\n170: }\n171: \n172: # Ensure directories exist\n173: CONTEXT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n174: ARCHIVE_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n175: \n176: # Event bus\n177: event_bus = EventBus(AGENT_DIR / \"runtime\" / \"events\") if BUS_AVAILABLE else None\n178: \n179: # Circuit breaker state\n180: CIRCUIT_BREAKER_PATH = AGENT_DIR / \"runtime\" / \"circuit_breaker.json\"\n181: BUILDER_LOCK_PATH = AGENT_DIR / \"runtime\" / \"builder_lock.txt\"\n182: \n183: # ============================================================================\n184: # SCOPE GATE UTILITIES\n185: # ============================================================================\n186: \n187: EXCLUDE_FILES_REL = {\n188:     \"work_plan.md\",\n189:     \"execution_log.md\",\n190:     \"STATE.md\",\n191:     \"TURN.md\",\n192:     \"notifications.md\",\n193:     \".session_state.json\",\n194: }\n195: EXCLUDE_FILES = {str((COLLAB_DIR / f).resolve()) for f in EXCLUDE_FILES_REL}\n196: EXCLUDE_FILES.add(str((CONTEXT_DIR / \"project_map.md\").resolve()))\n197: # Exclude bus runtime files (events.jsonl is managed by the bus, not the Builder)\n198: EXCLUDE_FILES.add(str((AGENT_DIR / \"runtime\" / \"events\" / \"events.jsonl\").resolve()))\n199: # Exclude agent config directory (managed by agents_config.py, not the Builder)\n200: EXCLUDE_FILES.add(str((AGENT_DIR / \"config\").resolve()))\n201: \n202: \n203: def parse_files_likely_touched(work_plan_content: str) -> set[str]:\n204:     \"\"\"Parse Files Likely Touched from work_plan.md.\"\"\"\n205:     lines = work_plan_content.split(\"\\n\")\n206:     in_section = False\n207:     files = set()\n208: \n209:     def _looks_like_path_token(token: str) -> bool:\n210:         if not token or \" \" in token:\n211:             return False\n212:         if token.startswith(\".\"):\n213:             return True\n214:         if \"/\" in token or \"\\\\\" in token:\n215:             return True\n216:         basename = token.rsplit(\"/\", 1)[-1].rsplit(\"\\\\\", 1)[-1]\n217:         return \".\" in basename\n218: \n219:     for line in lines:\n220:         line = line.strip()\n\n(Showing lines 1-220 of 2510. Use offset=221 to continue.)\n</content>","metadata":{"preview":"# ruff: noqa: S603,S607\n\"\"\"\nAgent Controller v5 - Sistema Multi-Agente\n==========================================\nOrquestador con:\n- Hook System (pre-action, post-tool y stop hooks)\n- Native Claude Code hooks (PostToolUse, PreCompact, Stop, SubagentStop)\n- Completion Verification antes de review\n- Quality Gates extendidos\n- Session Recovery\n- Project Map y estado del workflow\n\nUso:\n    python .agent/agent_controller.py              # Ver estado y turno actual\n    python .agent/agent_controller.py --json       # Output en JSON\n    python .agent/agent_controller.py --skip-gates # Saltar Quality Gates\n    python .agent/agent_controller.py --archive    # Archivar notificaciones antiguas\n    python .agent/agent_controller.py --validate   # Solo validar archivos de estado\n    python .agent/agent_controller.py --strict     # Modo estricto (bloquea si falla)\n    python .agent/agent_controller.py --bootstrap-ticket # Emitir STATE_CHANGED inicial para el ticket activo","truncated":true,"loaded":[]},"title":".agent\\agent_controller.py","time":{"start":1779388343694,"end":1779388343703}},"metadata":{"openai":{"itemId":"fc_04b38c48366f62a5016a0f4f86b5508191a4ebd9817f710d72"}},"id":"prt_e4bcf658c001ghUyR4LARGnwHj","sessionID":"ses_1b430cff0ffeQrpJh4nK8aIvii","messageID":"msg_e4bcf30fa001Y7hOutbUVxxPkh"}}

noqa: E402\n40: from bus.state_machine import StateMachine, TicketState  # noqa: E402\n41: from bus.supervisor import SequentialTicketSupervisor  # noqa: E402\n42: from bus.time_utils import now_local  # noqa: E402\n43: \n44: \n45: @dataclass(slots=True)\n46: class BridgeState:\n47:     \"\"\"Persisted bridge state to avoid duplicate reviews.\"\"\"\n48: \n49:     last_processed_sequence: int = 0\n50:     last_ticket_id: str | None = None\n51:     last_ticket_state: str = \"\"\n52:     updated_at: str = \"\"\n53: \n54:     def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, str | None]:\n55:         return {\n56:             \"last_processed_sequence\": self.last_processed_sequence,\n57:             \"last_ticket_id\": self.last_ticket_id,\n58:             \"last_ticket_state\": self.last_ticket_state,\n59:             \"updated_at\": self.updated_at,\n60:         }\n61: \n62:     @classmethod\n63:     def from_dict(cls, data: dict[str, object]) -> BridgeState:\n64:         return cls(\n65:             last_processed_sequence=int(data.get(\"last_processed_sequence\", 0)),\n66:             last_ticket_id=data.get(\"last_ticket_id\") or None,\n67:             last_ticket_state=str(data.get(\"last_ticket_state\", \"\")),\n68:             updated_at=str(data.get(\"updated_at\", \"\")),\n69:         )\n70: \n71: \n72: def _state_path() -> Path:\n73:     return PROJECT_ROOT / \".agent\" / \"runtime\" / \"manager_bridge_state.json\"\n74: \n75: \n76: def _resolve_manager_executable(explicit: Path | None) -> Path:\n77:     if explicit is not None:\n78:         if explicit.exists():\n79:             return explicit\n80:         raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Manager backend executable not found: {explicit}\")\n81: \n82:     # Resuelve el ejecutable del backend asignado a MANAGER en agents.json.\n83:     # WP-2026-072 movio el Manager a OpenCode; no se asume Codex (legacy).\n84:     try:\n85:         from agents_config import get_backend_for_role, load_agents_config\n86: \n87:         backend = get_backend_for_role(\"MANAGER\", load_agents_config(PROJECT_ROOT))\n88:     except Exception:\n89:         backend = \"opencode\"  # agents.json ilegible -> default OpenCode\n90: \n91:     detected = shutil.which(backend)\n92:     if detected:\n93:         return Path(detected)\n94: \n95:     raise FileNotFoundError(\n96:         f\"No se pudo localizar el ejecutable del backend Manager '{backend}'. \"\n97:         \"Pasa --backend-path con la ruta explicita.\"\n98:     )\n99: \n100: \n101: def _load_state() -> BridgeState:\n102:     path = _state_path()\n103:     if not path.exists():\n104:         return BridgeState()\n105:     return BridgeState.from_dict(json.loads(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")))\n106: \n107: \n108: def _save_state(state: BridgeState) -> None:\n109:     path = _state_path()\n110:     path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n111:     state.updated_at = datetime.now(tz=timezone.utc).isoformat()\n112:     path.write_text(\n113:         json.dumps(state.to_dict(), indent=2, ensure_ascii=False),\n114:         encoding=\"utf-8\",\n115:     )\n116: \n117: \n118: def _append_block(path: Path, block: str) -> None:\n119:     content = path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\") if path.exists() else \"\"\n120:     content = content.rstrip()\n121:     if content:\n122:         content += \"\\n\\n---\\n\\n\"\n123:     content += block.rstrip() + \"\\n\"\n124:     path.write_text(content, encoding=\"utf-8\")\n125: \n126: \n127: def _ticket_state(\n128:     supervisor: SequentialTicketSupervisor,\n129: ) -> tuple[str | None, TicketState, int]:\n130:     state = supervisor.load_state()\n131:     ticket_id = state.active_ticket\n132:     if not ticket_id:\n133:         return None, TicketState.IN_PROGRESS, 0\n134:     events = supervisor.event_bus.read_events(ticket_id=ticket_id)\n135:     latest_sequence = events[-1].sequence_number if events else 0\n136:     current_state = (\n137:         StateMachine.derive_state_from_events([event.to_dict() for event in events])\n138:         if events\n139:         else TicketState.IN_PROGRESS\n140:     )\n\n(Showing lines 1-140 of 402. import (  # noqa: E402\n33:     SequentialTicketSupervisor,\n34: )\n35: \n36: \n37: def build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:\n38:     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\"Sequential parser.add_argument(\n45:         \"--reactive\",\n46:         action=\"store_true\",\n47:         help=\"Poll events for a limited time (acotado, safer than --loop)\",\n48:     )\n49:     parser.add_argument(\n50:         \"--timeout\",\n51:         type=float,\n52:         default=300.0,\n53:         help=\"Idle timeout in seconds for --reactive mode (default 300s / resets on activity)\",\n54:     )\n55:     parser.add_argument(\n56:         \"--loop\",\n57:         action=\"store_true\",\n58:         help=\"Run continuously as a daemon (use with caution)\",\n59: return parser\n72: \n73: \n74: def main() -> int:\n75:     parser = build_parser()\n76:     args = parser.parse_args()\n77:     supervisor = SequentialTicketSupervisor(\n78:         project_root=PROJECT_ROOT,\n79:         auto_sync=not args.no_auto_sync,\n80:     )\n81: \n82:     if args.reactive:\n83:         supervisor.bootstrap()\n84:         state = supervisor.load_state()\n85:         print(\n86:             f\"[ticket-supervisor] reactive mode start | active={state.active_ticket or 'NONE'} \"\n87:             f\"| completed={len(state.completed_tickets)} | timeout={args.timeout}s\",\n88:             flush=True,\n89:         )\n90:         supervisor.run_reactive(timeout_seconds=args.timeout)\n91:         return 0\n92: \n93:     if args.loop:\n94:         supervisor.bootstrap()\n95:         state = supervisor.load_state()\n96:         print(\n97:             f\"[ticket-supervisor] loop mode start | AGENT_DIR / \"runtime\" / \"pytest-safe\"\n46: LOCK_FILE = RUNTIME_DIR / \"pytest.lock\"\n47: LAST_RUN_LOG = RUNTIME_DIR / \"last-run.log\"\n48: LAST_RUN_JSON = RUNTIME_DIR / \"last-run.json\"\n49: \n50: DEFAULT_PYTEST_ARGS = [\n51:     \"tests/test_event_bus.py\",\n52:     \"tests/test_supervisor.py\",\n53:     \"tests/test_agent_controller.py\",\n54:     \"tests/test_redact.py\",\n55: \"-p\",\n73:     \"no:cacheprovider\",\n74: ]\n75: \n76: LEVEL_CHOICES = {\"unit\", \"integration\", \"all\"}\n77: \n78: \n79: def iso_now() -> str:\n80:     return datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat()\n81: \n82: \n83: def ensure_runtime_dir() -> None:\n84:     RUNTIME_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n85: \n86: \n87: def is_pid_running(pid: int) -> bool:\n88:     if pid <= 0:\n89:         return False\n90:     try:\n91:         os.kill(pid, 0)\n92:     except OSError:\n93:         return False\n94:     return True\n95: \n96: \n97: def read_json(path: Path) -> dict:\n98:     try:\n99:         return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n100:     except Exception:\n101:         return {}\n102: \n103: \n104: def write_json(path: Path, payload: dict) -> None:\n105:     path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n106: \n107: \n108: def acquire_lock(force_unlock: bool = False) -> dict:\n109:     ensure_runtime_dir()\n110: \n111:     if LOCK_FILE.exists():\n112:         stale = True\n113:         lock_data = read_json(LOCK_FILE)\n114:         lock_pid = int(lock_data.get(\"pid\", 0) or 0)\n115:         if is_pid_running(lock_pid):\n116:             stale = False\n117:         if not stale and not force_unlock:\n118:             raise RuntimeError(\n119:                 f\"Ya hay un pytest activo (pid={lock_pid}). \"\n120:                 f\"Si estas seguro de que es stale, usa --force-unlock.\"\n\n(Showing lines 1-120 of \"\"\"\n2: Unit tests for runtime/project_root.py - WP-2026-122.\n3: \n4: Tests cover:\n5: - Precedence: AGENT_PROJECT_ROOT env var > derived from __file__\n6: - Fallback behavior when env var is not set\n7: - Import-safe: no side effects at import time\n8: - Caching: repeated calls return same cached value\n9: - Cache clearing for testing scenarios\n10: \"\"\"\n11: \n12: from __future__ import annotations\n13: \n14: import os\n15: from pathlib import Path\n16: from unittest.mock import patch\n17: \n18: import pytest\n19: \n20: from runtime.project_root import (\n21:     _LazyPaths,\n22:     clear_cache,\n23:     get_agent_dir,\n24:     get_collab_dir,\n25:     get_context_dir,\n26:     get_runtime_dir,\n27:     get_scripts_dir,\n28:     lazy_paths,\n29:     resolve_project_root,\n30: )\n31: \n32: \n33: class TestResolveProjectRoot:\n34:     \"\"\"Tests for resolve_project_root() function.\"\"\"\n35: \n36:     def test_fallback_to_derived_when_no_env(self) -> None:\n37:         \"\"\"When AGENT_PROJECT_ROOT is not set, derive from __file__.\"\"\"\n38:         clear_cache()\n39:         with patch.dict(os.environ, {}, clear=False):\n40:             # Remove AGENT_PROJECT_ROOT if it exists\n41:             env_copy = os.environ.copy()\n42:             env_copy.pop(\"AGENT_PROJECT_ROOT\", None)\n43:             with patch.dict(os.environ, env_copy, clear=True):\n44:                 # Need to reload the module to pick up new env\n45:                 import importlib\n46: \n47:                 import runtime.project_root as pr\n48: \n49:                 importlib.reload(pr)\n50:                 root = pr.resolve_project_root()\n51: \n52:                 # Should be parent of runtime/ directory (which is project root)\n53:                 # runtime/project_root.py -> runtime/ -> project root\n54:                 expected = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent.parent\n55:                 assert root == expected\n56: \n57:     def test_env_var_takes_precedence(self) -> None:\n58:         \"\"\"AGENT_PROJECT_ROOT environment variable takes precedence.\"\"\"\n59:         clear_cache()\n60:         fake_root = Path(\"/fake/project/root\").resolve()\n61: \n62:         with patch.dict(os.environ, {\"AGENT_PROJECT_ROOT\": str(fake_root)}):\n63:             # Need to reload the module to pick up new env\n64:             import importlib\n65: \n66:             import runtime.project_root as pr\n67: \n68:             importlib.reload(pr)\n69:             root = pr.resolve_project_root()\n70: \n71:             assert root == fake_root\n72: \n73:     def test_empty_env_var_falls_back(self) -> None:\n74:         \"\"\"Empty AGENT_PROJECT_ROOT falls back to derivation.\"\"\"\n75:         clear_cache()\n76: {"type":"text","timestamp":1779388764426,"sessionID":"ses_1b430cff0ffeQrpJh4nK8aIvii","part":{"id":"prt_e4bd5cf0b0011zVpkU8O04y9rV","messageID":"msg_e4bd5379a0018rHXGTu4QQaYbd","sessionID":"ses_1b430cff0ffeQrpJh4nK8aIvii","type":"text","text":"Review complete. Found issues:\n- `--project-root` is set in `agent_controller.main()` too late; `resolve_project_root()` is already cached at import time, so the flag does not actually re-root the running process.\n- The entry-point rollout is incomplete: only `.agent/agent_controller.py` accepts `--project-root`; the other declared runtime entry points still use import-time root resolution and lack the flag.\n- Add tests covering entry-point propagation (`--project-root`/`AGENT_PROJECT_ROOT`) and cache invalidation behavior, not just `runtime.project_root` env precedence.\n- The diff includes out-of-scope files not listed in the approved `Files Likely Touched` whitelist (`.agent/collaboration/*`, `.agent/context/project_map.md`, `.agent/runtime/deliverables/WP-2026-121-project-root-audit.md`).\n\nDECISION: CHANGES","time":{"start":1779388763915,"end":1779388764424},"metadata":{"openai":{"itemId":"msg_04909410251faed0016a0f512afcfc8191aa0870b1056a82b7","phase":"final_answer"}}}}

EXEC_LOG = COLLAB_DIR / \"execution_log.md\"\n45: REVIEW_QUEUE = COLLAB_DIR / \"review_queue.md\"\n46: FINDINGS = COLLAB_DIR / \"findings.md\"\n47: \n48: \n49: def check_completion() -> dict[str, Any]:\n50:     \"\"\"Verifica criterios de completitud simplificados.\"\"\"\n51:     checks = {\n52:         \"tasks_completed\": _check_all_tasks_done(),\n53:         \"tests_passing\": _check_tests_pass(),\n54:         \"no_escalations\": _check_no_pending_escalations(),\n55:         \"log_has_summary\": _check_execution_summary(),\n56:         \"findings_exist\": _check_findings_exist(),\n57:     }\n58: \n59:     passed = sum(1 for value in checks.values() if value)\n60:     total = len(checks)\n61:     percentage = int((passed / total) * 100) if total > 0 else 0\n62:     can_complete = passed >= 4\n63: \n64:     missing = []\n65:     check_names = {\n66:         \"tasks_completed\": \"Tareas pendientes en work_plan.md\",\n67:         \"tests_passing\": \"Tests fallando\",\n68:         \"no_escalations\": \"Escalaciones pendientes en review_queue.md\",\n69:         \"log_has_summary\": \"Falta resumen en execution_log.md\",\n70:         \"findings_exist\": \"No existe findings.md (opcional pero recomendado)\",\n71:     }\n72: \n73:     for check_name, passed_check in checks.items():\n74:         if not passed_check:\n75:             missing.append(check_names.get(check_name, check_name))\n76: \n77:     return {\n78:         \"can_complete\": can_complete,\n79:         \"percentage\": percentage,\n80:         \"checks\": checks,\n81:         \"missing\": missing,\n82:         \"passed\": passed,\n83:         \"total\": total,\n84:     }\n85: \n86: \n87: def show_completion_report(result: dict[str, Any]) -> None:\n88:     \"\"\"Muestra reporte de completitud de forma legible.\"\"\"\n89:     emoji = \"âœ…\" if result[\"can_complete\"] else \"âš ï¸\"\n90:     status = \"LISTO PARA COMPLETAR\" if result[\"can_complete\"] else \"INCOMPLETO\"\n91: \n92:     print(\"\\n\" + \"=\" * 60)\n93:     print(f\"{emoji} VERIFICACION DE COMPLETITUD: {status}\")\n94:     print(\"=\" * 60)\n95:     print(f\"Progreso: {result['passed']}/{result['total']} ({result['percentage']}%)\")\n96: \n97:     if result[\"missing\"]:\n98:         print(\"\\nItems faltantes:\")\n99:         for item in result[\"missing\"]:\n100:             print(f\"  - {item}\")\n101:     else:\n102:         print(\"\\nâœ… Todos los criterios cumplidos\")\n103: \n104:     print(\"=\" * 60 + \"\\n\")\n105: \n106: \n107: def safe_print(text: str, end: str = \"\\n\") -> None:\n108:     try:\n109:         print(text, end=end)\n110:     except UnicodeEncodeError:\n111:         ascii_text = text.encode(\"ascii\", errors=\"replace\").decode(\"ascii\")\n112:         print(ascii_text, end=end)\n113: \n114: \n115: def _check_all_tasks_done() -> bool:\n116:     \"\"\"Verifica que todas las tareas esten marcadas [x].\"\"\"\n117:     if not WORK_PLAN.exists():\n118:         return False\n119: \n120:     try:\n121:         content = WORK_PLAN.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")\n122:         return content.count(\"- [ ]\") == 0\n123:     except Exception:\n124:         return False\n125: \n126: \n127: def _check_tests_pass() -> bool:\n128:     \"\"\"Verifica que los tests pasen (si hay tests).\"\"\"\n129:     tests_dir = PROJECT_ROOT / \"tests\"\n130:     if not tests_dir.exists():\n131:         return True\n132: \n133:     try:\n134:         result = subprocess.run(\n135:             [\"uv\", \"run\", 0\n141:     except (subprocess.TimeoutExpired, FileNotFoundError):\n142:         return True\n143: \n144: \n145: def _check_no_pending_escalations() -> bool:\n146:     \"\"\"Verifica que no haya escalaciones pendientes.\"\"\"\n147:     if not REVIEW_QUEUE.exists():\n148:         return True\n149: \n150:     try:\n151:         content = REVIEW_QUEUE.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")\n152:         import re\n153: \n154:         has_pending = re.search(r\"PENDING\", content) is not None\n155:         has_blocked = re.search(r\"BLOCKED\", content) is not None\n156:         return not has_pending and not has_blocked\n157:     except Exception:\n158:         return True\n159: \n160: \n161: def _check_execution_summary() -> bool:\n162:     \"\"\"Verifica que execution_log tenga resumen.\"\"\"\n163:     if not EXEC_LOG.exists():\n164:         return False\n165: \n166:     try:\n167:         content = EXEC_LOG.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")\n168:         import re\n169: \n170:         has_summary = re.search(r\"##\\s+.*Resumen\", content) is not None\n171:         not_in_progress = re.search(r\"IN_PROGRESS\", content) is None\n172:         return has_summary and not_in_progress\n173:     except Exception:\n174:         return False\n175: \n176: \n177: def _check_findings_exist() -> bool:\n178:     \"\"\"Verifica que exista findings.md (opcional pero content\n185:     except Exception:\n186:         return False\n187: \n188: \n189: if __name__ == \"__main__\":\n190:     import sys\n191: \n192:     result = check_completion()\n193: None\n21:     resolve_project_root = None\n22: \n23: COLLAB_DIR = (\n24:     get_collab_dir()\n25:     if get_collab_dir is not None\n26:     else Path(__file__).parent / \"collaboration\"\n27: )\n28: PROJECT_ROOT = (\n29:     resolve_project_root()\n30:     if resolve_project_root is not None\n31:     else Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent\n32: )\n33: \n34: # Deferred path resolution for collaboration files\n35: WORK_PLAN = COLLAB_DIR / \"work_plan.md\"\n36: EXEC_LOG = COLLAB_DIR / \"execution_log.md\"\n37: REVIEW_QUEUE = COLLAB_DIR / \"review_queue.md\"\n38: \n39: \n40: def _read_text(path: Path) -> str:\n41:     try:\n42:         if not path.exists():\n43:             return \"\"\n44:         return path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")\n45:     except Exception:\n46:         return \"\"\n47: \n48: \n49: def get_log_status(log_path: Path) -> str:\n50:     content = _read_text(log_path)\n51:     if not content:\n52:         return \"\"\n53:     for line in content.splitlines():\n54:         if \"**Estado:**\" in line:\n55:             return line.split(\"**Estado:**\", 1)[1].strip().upper()\n56:     return \"\"\n57: \n58: \n59: def is_relaxed_completion_status(status: str) -> bool:\n60:     return status.upper() in {\"READY_FOR_REVIEW\", \"COMPLETED\"}\n61: \n62: \n63: def check_tasks_completed(plan_path: Path, log_status: str) -> bool:\n64:     if is_relaxed_completion_status(log_status):\n65:         return True\n66:     content = _read_text(plan_path)\n67:     if not content:\n68:         return False\n69:     return \"- [ ]\" not in content\n70: \n71: \n72: def check_execution_summary(log_path: Path, log_status: str | None = None) -> bool:\n73:     if log_status and is_relaxed_completion_status(log_status):\n74:         return True\n75:     content = _read_text(log_path)\n76:     if not content:\n77:         return False\n78:     upper = content.upper()\n79:     if \"IN_PROGRESS\" in upper:\n80:         return False\n81:     return \"**ESTADO:**\" in upper or \"RESUMEN\" in upper\n82: \n83: \n84: def check_no_escalations(queue_path: Path) -> bool:\n85:     content = _read_text(queue_path)\n86:     if not content:\n87:         return True\n88:     upper = content.upper()\n89:     return \"PENDING\" not in upper and \"BLOCKED\" not in upper\n90: \n91: \n92: def resolve_test_command(project_root: Path) -> list[str]:\n93:     tests_dir = project_root / \"tests\"\n94:     if not tests_dir.exists():\n95:         return []\n96:     safe_runner = project_root / \"scripts\" / \"run_pytest_safe.py\"\n97:     if safe_runner.exists():\n98:         return [sys.executable, str(safe_runner), \"--level\", \"unit\"]\n99:     return [sys.executable, \"-m\", \"pytest\", \"tests\", \"-q\"]\n100: \n101: \n102: def run_tests(project_root: Path) -> bool:\n103:     cmd = resolve_test_command(project_root)\n104:     if not cmd:\n105:         return True\n106:     try:\n107:         result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True, cwd=project_root)\n108:         return result.returncode == 0\n109:     except (FileNotFoundError, PermissionError):\n110:         return True\n111: \n112: \n113: def check_quality_gates(project_root: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:\n114:     return {\n115:         \"tests\": run_tests(project_root),\n116:         \"tasks_completed\": check_tasks_completed(WORK_PLAN, get_log_status(EXEC_LOG)),\n117:         \"no_escalations\": check_no_escalations(REVIEW_QUEUE),\n118:         \"execution_summary\": check_execution_summary(\n119:             EXEC_LOG, {"type":"tool_use","timestamp":1779391350013,"sessionID":"ses_1b402d937ffeqtTPG4uh0VppFe","part":{"type":"tool","tool":"read","callID":"call_2gjGGmHGrzfwI4AKUSruEBvu","state":{"status":"completed","input":{"filePath":"C:\\Users\\fdl\\Proyectos_Python\\z_scripts\\orquestador_de_agentes\\runtime\\project_root.py","offset":1,"limit":260},"output":"<path>C:\\Users\\fdl\\Proyectos_Python\\z_scripts\\orquestador_de_agentes\\runtime\\project_root.py</path>\n<type>file</type>\n<content>\n1: \"\"\"\n2: Project Root Resolution Module - Central contract for WP-2026-122.\n3: \n4: This module provides a single source of truth for resolving the project root\n5: path, supporting both the default motor repository and external destination\n6: workspaces via environment variable injection.\n7: \n8: Precedence (effective):\n9:     1. AGENT_PROJECT_ROOT environment variable (set by entry points after parsing --project-root)\n10:     2. Derived from Path(__file__) (defaults to motor repository)\n11: \n12: Usage:\n13:     from runtime.project_root import resolve_project_root, get_agent_dir, get_collab_dir\n14: \n15:     root = resolve_project_root()  # Path to project root\n16:     agent_dir = get_agent_dir()    # Path to .agent/ directory\n17:     collab_dir = get_collab_dir()  # Path to .agent/collaboration/ directory\n18: \n19: Design:\n20:     - Import-safe: no side effects at import time\n21:     - Cacheable: results are memoized for performance\n22:     - Single mechanism: resolve_project_root() is the only resolution path\n23:     - Backward compatible: defaults to motor repo when no external root is injected\n24: \"\"\"\n25: \n26: from __future__ import annotations\n27: \n28: import os\n29: from functools import lru_cache\n30: from pathlib import Path\n31: \n32: \n33: @lru_cache(maxsize=1)\n34: def resolve_project_root() -> Path:\n35:     \"\"\"\n36:     Resolve the project root path with proper precedence.\n37: \n38:     Before: Requires no state; reads os.environ[\"AGENT_PROJECT_ROOT\"] if set.\n39:     During: Checks environment variable first, then falls back to derivation from __file__.\n40:     After: Returns absolute Path to project root, cached for subsequent calls.\n41: \n42:     Precedence:\n43:         1. AGENT_PROJECT_ROOT environment variable (if set and non-empty)\n44:         2. Derived from this module's location (runtime/project_root.py -> parent)\n45: \n46:     Returns:\n47:         Absolute Path to the project root directory.\n48: \n49:     Note:\n50:         Entry points that accept --project-root should export the value to\n51:         AGENT_PROJECT_ROOT environment variable immediately after parsing,\n52:         before importing any modules that depend on the project root.\n53:         This ensures a single channel of propagation (env var) rather than\n54:         parallel mechanisms.\n55:     \"\"\"\n56:     # Check environment variable first (set by entry points after CLI parsing)\n57:     env_root = os.environ.get(\"AGENT_PROJECT_ROOT\", \"\").strip()\n58:     if env_root:\n59:         return Path(env_root).resolve()\n60: \n61:     # Fallback: derive from this module's location\n62:     # runtime/project_root.py -> runtime/ -> project root\n63:     return Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent\n64: \n65: \n66: @lru_cache(maxsize=1)\n67: def #!/usr/bin/env python3\n2: \"\"\"Run an automated manager review when a ticket reaches READY_FOR_REVIEW.\n3: \n4: WP-2026-122: Uses runtime.project_root for dynamic project root resolution.\n5: \"\"\"\n6: \n7: from __future__ import annotations\n8: \n9: import argparse\n10: import json\n11: import re\n12: import shutil\n13: import subprocess\n14: import sys\n15: import time\n16: from dataclasses import dataclass\n17: from datetime import datetime, timezone\n18: from pathlib import Path\n19: \n20: \n21: # WP-2026-122: Deferred path resolution via runtime.project_root\n22: try:\n23:     from runtime.project_root import resolve_project_root\n24: except ImportError:\n25:     # Fallback if runtime.project_root not available\n26:     resolve_project_root = None\n27: \n28: PROJECT_ROOT = (\n29:     resolve_project_root()\n30:     if resolve_project_root is not None\n31:     else Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]\n32: )\n33: AGENT_DIR = PROJECT_ROOT / \".agent\"\n34: if str(PROJECT_ROOT) not in sys.path:\n35:     sys.path.insert(0, str(PROJECT_ROOT))\n36: if str(AGENT_DIR) not in sys.path:\n37:     sys.path.insert(0, str(AGENT_DIR))\n38: \n39: from bus.review_bridge import ReviewBridge  # noqa: E402\n40: from bus.state_machine import StateMachine, TicketState  # noqa: E402\n41: from bus.supervisor import SequentialTicketSupervisor  # noqa: E402\n42: from bus.time_utils import now_local  # noqa: E402\n43: \n44: \n45: @dataclass(slots=True)\n46: class BridgeState:\n47:     \"\"\"Persisted bridge state to avoid duplicate reviews.\"\"\"\n48: \n49:     last_processed_sequence: int = 0\n50:     last_ticket_id: str | None = None\n51:     last_ticket_state: str = \"\"\n52:     updated_at: str = \"\"\n53: \n54:     def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, str | None]:\n55:         return {\n56:             \"last_processed_sequence\": self.last_processed_sequence,\n57:             \"last_ticket_id\": self.last_ticket_id,\n58:             \"last_ticket_state\": self.last_ticket_state,\n59:             \"updated_at\": self.updated_at,\n60:         }\n61: \n62:     @classmethod\n63:     def from_dict(cls, data: dict[str, object]) -> BridgeState:\n64:         return cls(\n65:             last_processed_sequence=int(data.get(\"last_processed_sequence\", 0)),\n66:             last_ticket_id=data.get(\"last_ticket_id\") or None,\n67:             last_ticket_state=str(data.get(\"last_ticket_state\", \"\")),\n68:             updated_at=str(data.get(\"updated_at\", \"\")),\n69:         )\n70: \n71: \n72: def _state_path() -> Path:\n73:     return PROJECT_ROOT / \".agent\" / \"runtime\" / \"manager_bridge_state.json\"\n74: \n75: \n76: def _resolve_manager_executable(explicit: Path | None) -> Path:\n77:     if explicit is not None:\n78:         if explicit.exists():\n79:             return explicit\n80:         raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Manager backend executable not found: {explicit}\")\n81: \n82:     # Resuelve el ejecutable del backend asignado a MANAGER en agents.json.\n83:     # WP-2026-072 movio el Manager a OpenCode; no se asume Codex (legacy).\n84:     try:\n85:         from agents_config import get_backend_for_role, load_agents_config\n86: \n87:         backend = get_backend_for_role(\"MANAGER\", load_agents_config(PROJECT_ROOT))\n88:     except Exception:\n89:         backend = \"opencode\"  # agents.json ilegible -> default OpenCode\n90: \n91:     detected = shutil.which(backend)\n92:     if detected:\n93:         return Path(detected)\n94: \n95:     raise FileNotFoundError(\n96:         f\"No se pudo localizar el ejecutable del backend Manager '{backend}'. \"\n97:         \"Pasa --backend-path con la ruta explicita.\"\n98:     )\n99: \n100: \n101: def _load_state() -> BridgeState:\n102:     path = _state_path()\n103:     if not path.exists():\n104:         return BridgeState()\n105:     return BridgeState.from_dict(json.loads(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")))\n106: \n107: \n108: def _save_state(state: BridgeState) -> None:\n109:     path = _state_path()\n110:     path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n111:     state.updated_at = datetime.now(tz=timezone.utc).isoformat()\n112:     path.write_text(\n113:         json.dumps(state.to_dict(), indent=2, ensure_ascii=False),\n114:         encoding=\"utf-8\",\n115:     )\n116: \n117: \n118: def _append_block(path: Path, block: str) -> None:\n119:     content = path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\") if path.exists() else \"\"\n120:     content = content.rstrip()\n121:     if content:\n122:         content += \"\\n\\n---\\n\\n\"\n123:     content += block.rstrip() + \"\\n\"\n124:     path.write_text(content, encoding=\"utf-8\")\n125: \n126: \n127: def _ticket_state(\n128:     supervisor: SequentialTicketSupervisor,\n129: ) -> tuple[str | None, TicketState, int]:\n130:     state = supervisor.load_state()\n131:     ticket_id = state.active_ticket\n132:     if not ticket_id:\n133:         return None, TicketState.IN_PROGRESS, 0\n134:     events = supervisor.event_bus.read_events(ticket_id=ticket_id)\n135:     latest_sequence = events[-1].sequence_number if events else 0\n136:     current_state = (\n137:         StateMachine.derive_state_from_events([event.to_dict() for event in events])\n138:         if events\n139:         else TicketState.IN_PROGRESS\n140:     )\n141: \n142:     if current_state == TicketState.IN_PROGRESS:\n143:         log_status = _execution_log_state(supervisor)\n144:         fallback_map = {\n145:             \"READY_FOR_REVIEW\": TicketState.READY_FOR_REVIEW,\n146:             \"READY_TO_CLOSE\": TicketState.READY_TO_CLOSE,\n147:             \"COMPLETED\": TicketState.COMPLETED,\n148:         }\n149:         current_state = fallback_map.get(log_status, current_state)\n150: \n151:     return ticket_id, current_state, latest_sequence\n152: \n153: \n154: def _execution_log_state(supervisor: SequentialTicketSupervisor) -> str:\n155:     \"\"\"Read the current execution log status as a fallback signal.\"\"\"\n156:     path = getattr(\n157:         supervisor,\n158:         \"execution_log_path\",\n159:         supervisor.collaboration_dir / \"execution_log.md\",\n160:     )\n161:     if not path.exists():\n162:         return \"\"\n163:     content = path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")\n164:     match = re.search(\n165:         r\"^\\s*-?\\s*\\*\\*Estado:\\*\\*\\s*([^\\n]+)\", content, flags=re.MULTILINE\n166:     )\n167:     if not match:\n168:         return \"\"\n169:     return match.group(1).strip().upper()\n170: \n171: \n172: def _record_review(\n173:     supervisor: SequentialTicketSupervisor,\n174:     ticket_id: str,\n175:     decision: str,\n176:     feedback: str,\n177:     source: str,\n178: ) -> None:\n179:     review_queue = supervisor.collaboration_dir / \"review_queue.md\"\n180:     notifications = supervisor.notifications_path\n181:     timestamp = now_local().strftime(\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S\")\n182: \n183:     _append_block(\n184:         review_queue,\n185:         \"\\n\".join(\n186:             [\n187:                 f\"### MANAGER REVIEW - {timestamp}\",\n188:                 f\"- **Plan ID:** {ticket_id}\",\n189:                 f\"- **Decision:** {decision}\",\n190:                 f\"- **Source:** {source}\",\n191:                 \"\",\n192:                 \"#### Summary\",\n193:                 feedback.strip() or \"(sin resumen)\",\n194:             ]\n195:         ),\n196:     )\n197: \n198:     _append_block(\n199:         notifications,\n200:         \"\\n\".join(\n201:             [\n202:                 f\"### MANAGER_REVIEW - {timestamp}\",\n203:                 f\"- **Plan ID:** {ticket_id}\",\n204:                 f\"- **Decision:** {decision}\",\n205:                 f\"- **Source:** {source}\",\n206:             ]\n207:         ),\n208:     )\n209: \n210: \n211: def _bridge_heartbeat(\n212:     *,\n213:     prefix: str,\n214:     active_ticket: str | None,\n215:     current_state: TicketState,\n216:     latest_sequence: int,\n217:     bridge_state: BridgeState,\n218: ) -> str:\n219:     timestamp = now_local().strftime(\"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z\")\n220:     ticket = active_ticket or \"NONE\"\n221:     bridge_ticket = bridge_state.last_ticket_id or \"NONE\"\n222:     bridge_state_name = bridge_state.last_ticket_state or \"NONE\"\n223:     updated_at = bridge_state.updated_at or \"NONE\"\n224:     return (\n225:         f\"[manager-review-bridge] {prefix} | ts={timestamp} | ticket={ticket} \"\n226:         f\"| state={current_state.value} | seq={latest_sequence} \"\n227:         f\"| last_processed={bridge_state.last_processed_sequence} \"\n228:         f\"| bridge_ticket={bridge_ticket} | bridge_state={bridge_state_name} \"\n229:         f\"| updated_at={updated_at}\"\n230:     )\n231: \n232: \n233: def _sync_ticket_checkpoint(\n234:     supervisor: SequentialTicketSupervisor,\n235:     ticket_id: str,\n236:     minimum_sequence: int,\n237: ) -> int:\n238:     \"\"\"Persist the latest processed sequence for the reviewed ticket only.\"\"\"\n239:     latest_ticket_event = supervisor.event_bus.latest_event(ticket_id=ticket_id)\n240:     checkpoint_sequence = minimum_sequence\n241:     if latest_ticket_event is not None:\n242:         checkpoint_sequence = max(\n243:             checkpoint_sequence, latest_ticket_event.sequence_number\n244:         )\n245: \n246:     state = supervisor.load_state()\n247:     if checkpoint_sequence > state.last_processed_sequence:\n248:         state.last_processed_sequence = checkpoint_sequence\n249:         supervisor.save_state(state)\n250:     return checkpoint_sequence\n251: \n252: \n253: def build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:\n254:     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(\n255:         description=\"Automated Codex manager review bridge\"\n256:     )\n257:     parser.add_argument(\n258:         \"--watch\",\n259:         action=\"store_true\",\n260:         help=\"Keep watching for READY_FOR_REVIEW tickets and trigger Codex review automatically\",\n\n(Showing lines 1-260 of 402. Use offset=261 to continue.)\n</content>","metadata":{"preview":"#!/usr/bin/env python3\n\"\"\"Run an automated manager review when a ticket reaches READY_FOR_REVIEW.\n\nWP-2026-122: Uses runtime.project_root for dynamic project root resolution.\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport argparse\nimport json\nimport re\nimport shutil\nimport subprocess\nimport sys\nimport time\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\n","truncated":true,"loaded":[]},"title":"scripts\\manager_review_bridge.py","time":{"start":1779391360233,"end":1779391360246}},"metadata":{"openai":{"itemId":"fc_04d3def4a4c8abaa016a0f5b4f339c819184ace33fd47a8709"}},"id":"prt_e4bfd6ce7001x6E7iQdflzO7Bd","sessionID":"ses_1b402d937ffeqtTPG4uh0VppFe","messageID":"msg_e4bfd4668001F4y3fEBuRJJOcK"}}

ruff: noqa: S603,S607\n2: \"\"\"\n3: Agent Controller v5 - Sistema Multi-Agente\n4: ==========================================\n5: Orquestador con:\n6: - Hook System (pre-action, post-tool y stop hooks)\n7: - Native Claude Code hooks (PostToolUse, PreCompact, Stop, SubagentStop)\n8: - Completion Verification antes de review\n9: - Quality Gates extendidos\n10: - Session Recovery\n11: - Project Map y estado del workflow\n12: \n13: Uso:\n14:     python .agent/agent_controller.py              # Ver estado y turno actual\n15:     python .agent/agent_controller.py --json       # Output en JSON\n16:     python .agent/agent_controller.py --skip-gates # Saltar Quality Gates\n17:     python .agent/agent_controller.py --archive    # Archivar notificaciones antiguas\n18:     python .agent/agent_controller.py --validate   # Solo validar archivos de estado\n19:     python .agent/agent_controller.py --strict     # Modo estricto (bloquea si falla)\n20:     python .agent/agent_controller.py --bootstrap-ticket # Emitir STATE_CHANGED inicial para el ticket activo\n21:     python .agent/agent_controller.py --project-root /path/to/destino  # Operar sobre workspace externo\n22: \"\"\"\n23: \n24: # Fix encoding issues on Windows\n25: import codecs\n26: import json\n27: import os\n28: import re\n29: import subprocess\n30: import sys\n31: from datetime import datetime, timezone\n32: from pathlib import Path\n33: \n34: \n35: if sys.platform == \"win32\":\n36:     sys.stdout = codecs.getwriter(\"utf-8\")(sys.stdout.buffer)\n37:     sys.stderr = codecs.getwriter(\"utf-8\")(sys.stderr.buffer)\n38: \n39: # Fix imports when run as script (not as package)\n40: # WP-2026-122: project_root is now resolved dynamically via runtime.project_root\n41: _AGENT_DIR = Path(__file__).parent.resolve()\n42: _PROJECT_ROOT_DERIVED = _AGENT_DIR.parent\n43: for _path in (str(_PROJECT_ROOT_DERIVED), str(_AGENT_DIR)):\n44:     if _path not in sys.path:\n45:         sys.path.insert(0, _path)\n46: \n47: # WP-2026-122: Import project_root module for dynamic path resolution\n48: # Entry points set AGENT_PROJECT_ROOT env var after parsing --project-root\n49: # Import AFTER sys.path setup to ensure runtime/ is importable\n50: from runtime.project_root import (  # noqa: E402\n51:     get_agent_dir,\n52:     get_collab_dir,\n53:     get_context_dir,\n54:     resolve_project_root,\n55: )\n56: \n57: \n58: # ============================================================================\n59: # IMPORTS: HOOK SYSTEM, SESSION TRACKER & COMPLETION CHECKER\n60: # ============================================================================\n61: try:\n62:     from hooks import registry as hook_registry\n63:     from hooks.post_tool_hook import post_tool_hook\n64:     from hooks.pre_action_hook import pre_action_hook\n65:     from hooks.stop_hook import stop_hook\n66: \n67:     HOOKS_AVAILABLE = True\n68:     hook_registry.register(\"pre_action\", pre_action_hook)\n69:     hook_registry.register(\"post_tool\", post_tool_hook)\n70:     hook_registry.register(\"stop\", stop_hook)\n71: except ImportError:\n72:     HOOKS_AVAILABLE = False\n73:     hook_registry = None\n74: \n75: try:\n76:     from session_tracker import recover_session, save_session, show_recovery_hint\n77: \n78:     SESSION_TRACKER_AVAILABLE = True\n79: except ImportError:\n80:     SESSION_TRACKER_AVAILABLE = False\n81: \n82: try:\n83:     from completion_checker import check_completion, show_completion_report\n84: \n85:     COMPLETION_CHECKER_AVAILABLE = True\n86: except ImportError:\n87:     COMPLETION_CHECKER_AVAILABLE = False\n88: \n89: try:\n90:     from bus.event_bus import EventBus\n91:     from bus.utils import count_trailing_changes\n92: \n93:     BUS_AVAILABLE = True\n94: except ImportError:\n95:     BUS_AVAILABLE = False\n96:     EventBus = None\n97:     count_trailing_changes = None\n98: \n99: # ============================================================================\n100: # PATH CONFIGURATION - WP-2026-122: Deferred resolution via project_root module\n101: # ============================================================================\n102: # Paths now resolved dynamically via runtime.project_root functions\n103: \n104: \n105: # Deferred path resolution - no longer fixed at import time\n106: SCRIPT_DIR = Path(__file__).parent\n107: PROJECT_ROOT = resolve_project_root()\n108: AGENT_DIR = get_agent_dir()\n109: COLLAB_DIR = get_collab_dir()\n110: CONTEXT_DIR = get_context_dir()\n111: \n112: # State files\n113: WORK_PLAN = COLLAB_DIR / \"work_plan.md\"\n114: EXEC_LOG = COLLAB_DIR / \"execution_log.md\"\n115: REVIEW_QUEUE = COLLAB_DIR / \"review_queue.md\"\n116: NOTIFICATIONS = COLLAB_DIR / \"notifications.md\"\n117: TURN_FILE = COLLAB_DIR / \"TURN.md\"\n118: STATE_FILE = COLLAB_DIR / \"STATE.md\"\n119: PROJECT_MAP = CONTEXT_DIR / \"project_map.md\"\n120: ARCHIVE_DIR = COLLAB_DIR / \"archive\"\n121: AGENTS_CONFIG_PATH = AGENT_DIR / \"config\" / \"agents.json\"\n122: \n123: # Archive configuration\n124: MAX_NOTIFICATIONS_SIZE_KB = 50\n125: MAX_NOTIFICATION_ENTRIES = 20\n126: \n127: # WP-2026-106 hotfix: HUMAN_GATE escalation threshold. Single source of truth\n128: # is manager_review.max_attempts in agents.json (shared with bus/review_bridge.py).\n129: # Fallback used only if config is missing or unreadable.\n130: HUMAN_GATE_REJECTION_FALLBACK = 5\n131: \n132: \n133: def get_human_gate_threshold() -> int:\n134:     \"\"\"Return the consecutive-CHANGES count that escalates a ticket to HUMAN_GATE.\n135: \n136:     Reads manager_review.max_attempts from agents.json so both this controller\n137:     and bus/review_bridge.py escalate on the same number. Falls back to\n138:     HUMAN_GATE_REJECTION_FALLBACK if the config is absent or malformed.\n139:     \"\"\"\n140:     try:\n141:         cfg = json.loads(AGENTS_CONFIG_PATH.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n142:         value = int(cfg.get(\"manager_review\", {}).get(\"max_attempts\"))\n143:         return value if value > 0 else HUMAN_GATE_REJECTION_FALLBACK\n144:     except (OSError, ValueError, TypeError, json.JSONDecodeError):\n145:         return HUMAN_GATE_REJECTION_FALLBACK\n146: \n147: \n148: # Configuracion de comprobaciones\n149: MAX_FILES_CIRCULAR_CHECK = 50\n150: \n151: # Estados validos para validacion\n152: VALID_PLAN_STATES = {\n153:     \"DRAFT\",\n154:     \"IN_PLANNING\",\n155:     \"APPROVED\",\n156:     \"IN_REVIEW\",\n157:     \"COMPLETED\",\n158:     \"N/A\",\n159: }\n160: VALID_LOG_STATES = {\n161:     \"PENDING\",\n162:     \"IN_PROGRESS\",\n163:     \"BLOCKED\",\n164:     \"READY_FOR_REVIEW\",\n165:     # WP-2026-106: HUMAN_GATE and READY_TO_CLOSE are real terminal-adjacent\n166:     # states emitted by bus/state_machine.py; the validator must accept them.\n167:     \"HUMAN_GATE\",\n168:     \"READY_TO_CLOSE\",\n169:     \"COMPLETED\",\n170:     \"N/A\",\n171: }\n172: \n173: # Ensure directories exist\n174: CONTEXT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n175: ARCHIVE_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n176: \n177: # Event bus\n178: event_bus = EventBus(AGENT_DIR / \"runtime\" / \"events\") if BUS_AVAILABLE else None\n179: \n180: # Circuit breaker state\n181: CIRCUIT_BREAKER_PATH = AGENT_DIR / \"runtime\" / \"circuit_breaker.json\"\n182: BUILDER_LOCK_PATH = AGENT_DIR / \"runtime\" / \"builder_lock.txt\"\n183: \n184: # ============================================================================\n185: # SCOPE GATE UTILITIES\n186: # ============================================================================\n187: \n188: EXCLUDE_FILES_REL = {\n189:     \"work_plan.md\",\n190:     \"execution_log.md\",\n191:     \"STATE.md\",\n192:     \"TURN.md\",\n193:     \"notifications.md\",\n194:     \".session_state.json\",\n195: }\n196: EXCLUDE_FILES = {str((COLLAB_DIR / f).resolve()) for f in EXCLUDE_FILES_REL}\n197: EXCLUDE_FILES.add(str((CONTEXT_DIR / \"project_map.md\").resolve()))\n198: # Exclude bus runtime files (events.jsonl is managed by the bus, not the Builder)\n199: EXCLUDE_FILES.add(str((AGENT_DIR / \"runtime\" / \"events\" / \"events.jsonl\").resolve()))\n200: # Exclude agent config directory (managed by agents_config.py, not the Builder)\n201: EXCLUDE_FILES.add(str((AGENT_DIR / \"config\").resolve()))\n202: \n203: \n204: def parse_files_likely_touched(work_plan_content: str) -> set[str]:\n205:     \"\"\"Parse Files Likely Touched from work_plan.md.\"\"\"\n206:     lines = work_plan_content.split(\"\\n\")\n207:     in_section = False\n208:     files = set()\n209: \n210:     def _looks_like_path_token(token: str) -> bool:\n211:         if not token or \" \" in token:\n212:             return False\n213:         if token.startswith(\".\"):\n214:             return True\n215:         if \"/\" in token or \"\\\\\" in token:\n216:             return True\n217:         basename = token.rsplit(\"/\", 1)[-1].rsplit(\"\\\\\", 1)[-1]\n218:         return \".\" in basename\n219: \n220:     for line in lines:\n\n(Showing lines 1-220 of 2511. Use offset=221 to continue.)\n</content>","metadata":{"preview":"# ruff: noqa: S603,S607\n\"\"\"\nAgent Controller v5 - Sistema Multi-Agente\n==========================================\nOrquestador con:\n- Hook System (pre-action, post-tool y stop hooks)\n- Native Claude Code hooks (PostToolUse, PreCompact, Stop, SubagentStop)\n- Completion Verification antes de review\n- Quality Gates extendidos\n- Session Recovery\n- Project Map y estado del workflow\n\nUso:\n    python .agent/agent_controller.py              # Ver estado y turno actual\n    python .agent/agent_controller.py --json       # Output en JSON\n    python .agent/agent_controller.py --skip-gates # Saltar Quality Gates\n    python .agent/agent_controller.py --archive    # Archivar notificaciones antiguas\n    python .agent/agent_controller.py --validate   # Solo validar archivos de estado\n    python .agent/agent_controller.py --strict     # Modo estricto (bloquea si falla)\n    python .agent/agent_controller.py --bootstrap-ticket # Emitir STATE_CHANGED inicial para el ticket activo","truncated":true,"loaded":[]},"title":".agent\\agent_controller.py","time":{"start":1779391360224,"end":1779391360250}},"metadata":{"openai":{"itemId":"fc_04d3def4a4c8abaa016a0f5b4f3388819185d449bfe1b99184"}},"id":"prt_e4bfd6cdc001rsD6mymIR9Kwd1","sessionID":"ses_1b402d937ffeqtTPG4uh0VppFe","messageID":"msg_e4bfd4668001F4y3fEBuRJJOcK"}}

Flag dispatch table\n2417: FLAG_HANDLERS = {\n2418:     \"--recover\": _handle_recover,\n2419:     \"--check-completion\": _handle_check_completion,\n2420:     \"--validate\": _handle_validate,\n2421:     \"--archive\": _handle_archive,\n2422:     \"--manager-approve\": _handle_manager_approve,\n2423:     \"--request-changes\": _handle_request_changes,\n2424: }\n2425: \n2426: \n2427: def main():  # noqa: C901 - CLI dispatch intentionally centralizes flag handling\n2428:     \"\"\"Funcion principal del controller.\"\"\"\n2429:     # WP-2026-122: Parse --project-root FIRST and export to environment\n2430:     # This must happen before any imports that depend on project_root\n2431:     if \"--project-root\" in sys.argv:\n2432:         idx = sys.argv.index(\"--project-root\")\n2433:         if idx + 1 < len(sys.argv) and not sys.argv[idx + 1].startswith(\"--\"):\n2434:             project_root_value = sys.argv[idx + 1]\n2435:             os.environ[\"AGENT_PROJECT_ROOT\"] = str(Path(project_root_value).resolve())\n2436: \n2437:     skip_gates = \"--skip-gates\" in sys.argv\n2438:     json_output = \"--json\" in sys.argv\n2439:     force_mode = \"--force\" in sys.argv\n2440:     strict_mode = \"--strict\" in sys.argv\n2441:     reset_turn_mode = \"--reset-turn\" in sys.argv\n2442: \n2443:     # Parse --scope-override\n2444:     scope_override = None\n2445:     if \"--scope-override\" in sys.argv:\n2446:         idx = sys.argv.index(\"--scope-override\")\n2447:         if idx + 1 >= len(sys.argv):\n2448:             print(\"[ERROR] --scope-override requires a reason.\")\n2449:             return 1\n2450:         next_token = sys.argv[idx + 1]\n2451:         # Reject if next token is another flag\n2452:         if next_token.startswith(\"--\"):\n2453:             print(\"[ERROR] --scope-override requires a reason, not another flag.\")\n2454:             return 1\n2455:         scope_override = next_token\n2456: \n2457:     # Parse --ticket (used by --manager-approve and --request-changes)\n2458:     ticket_id = None\n2459:     if \"--ticket\" in sys.argv:\n2460:         idx = sys.argv.index(\"--ticket\")\n2461:         if idx + 1 >= len(sys.argv):\n2462:             print(\"[ERROR] --ticket requires a ticket ID.\")\n2463:             return 1\n2464:         next_token = sys.argv[idx + 1]\n2465:         if next_token.startswith(\"--\"):\n2466:             print(\"[ERROR] --ticket requires a ticket ID, not another flag.\")\n2467:             return 1\n2468:         ticket_id = next_token\n2469:     elif \"--manager-approve\" in sys.argv:\n2470:         idx = sys.argv.index(\"--manager-approve\")\n2471:         if idx + 1 < len(sys.argv) and not sys.argv[idx + 1].startswith(\"--\"):\n2472:             ticket_id = sys.argv[idx + 1]\n2473:     elif \"--request-changes\" in sys.argv:\n2474:         idx = sys.argv.index(\"--request-changes\")\n2475:         if idx + 1 < len(sys.argv) and not sys.argv[idx + 1].startswith(\"--\"):\n2476:             ticket_id = sys.argv[idx + 1]\n2477: \n2478:     # Check for --mark-ready\n2479:     if \"--mark-ready\" in sys.argv:\n2480:         return _handle_mark_ready(scope_override, json_output, force_mode)\n2481: \n2482:     # Check for --bootstrap-ticket\n2483:     if \"--bootstrap-ticket\" in sys.argv:\n2484:         return _handle_bootstrap_ticket(json_output)\n2485: \n2486:     # Check for specific flag handlers\n2487:     for flag, handler in FLAG_HANDLERS.items():\n2488:         if flag in sys.argv:\n2489:             # Pass json_output to validate handler if needed\n2490:             if flag == \"--validate\":\n2491:                 return handler(json_output)\n2492:             # Pass ticket_id to manager-approve handler\n2493:             if flag in (\"--manager-approve\", \"--request-changes\"):\n2494:                 return handler(ticket_id, json_output, force_mode)\n2495:             return handler()\n2496: \n2497:     # Shared prechecks\n2498:     git_status = check_git_status()\n2499:     if not force_mode and git_status is False:\n2500:         print(\"\\n[WARN] Tienes cambios sin guardar en git.\")\n2501:         print(\"   Guarda tus cambios antes de continuar:\")\n2502:         print(\"   git add . && git commit -m 'Guardo trabajo'\")\n2503:         print(\"   O usa --force para ignorar.\\n\")\n2504:         return 1\n2505: \n2506:     # Main action\n2507:     return _handle_main_action(skip_gates, strict_mode, json_output, reset_turn_mode)\n2508: \n2509: \n2510: if __name__ == \"__main__\":\n2511:     sys.exit(main())\n\n(End of file - total 2511 lines)\n</content>","metadata":{"preview":"    return 0\n\n\ndef _handle_main_action(\n    skip_gates: bool, strict_mode: bool, json_output: bool, reset_turn_mode: bool\n) -> int:\n    \"\"\"Handle main action determination and output.\"\"\"\n    if SESSION_TRACKER_AVAILABLE:\n        show_recovery_hint()\n\n    print(\"\\n  Generando mapa del proyecto...\")\n    generate_project_map()\n    print(\"  [OK] Mapa actualizado\")\n\n    notif_errors = validate_state_files().get(\"notifications.md\", [])\n    if notif_errors:\n        fix_corrupted_notifications()\n\n    archive_old_notifications()\n","truncated":false,"loaded":[]},"title":".agent\\agent_controller.py","time":{"start":1779391360230,"end":1779391360253}},"metadata":{"openai":{"itemId":"fc_04d3def4a4c8abaa016a0f5b4f33948191806995a46c8317d8"}},"id":"prt_e4bfd6ce2001sTUfABQtW2tOxD","sessionID":"ses_1b402d937ffeqtTPG4uh0VppFe","messageID":"msg_e4bfd4668001F4y3fEBuRJJOcK"}}

__fspath__(self) -> str:\n41:         return str(self.resolve())\n42: \n43:     def __str__(self) -> str:\n44:         return str(self.resolve())\n45: \n46: \n47: PROJECT_ROOT = _LazyPath(_project_root)\n48: AGENT_DIR = _LazyPath(lambda: _project_root() / \".agent\")\n49: if str(PROJECT_ROOT) not in sys.path:\n50:     sys.path.insert(0, str(PROJECT_ROOT))\n51: if str(AGENT_DIR) not in sys.path:\n52:     sys.path.insert(0, str(AGENT_DIR))\n53: \n54: from bus.supervisor import (  # noqa: E402\n55:     SequentialTicketSupervisor,\n56: )\n57: \n58: \n59: def build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:\n60:     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\"Sequential ticket supervisor\")\n61:     parser.add_argument(\n62:         \"--once\",\n63:         action=\"store_true\",\n64:         help=\"Run a single supervision tick (default mode)\",\n65:     )\n66:     parser.add_argument(\n67:         \"--reactive\",\n68:         action=\"store_true\",\n69:         help=\"Poll events for a limited time (acotado, safer than --loop)\",\n70:     )\n71:     parser.add_argument(\n72:         \"--timeout\",\n73:         type=float,\n74:         default=300.0,\n75:         help=\"Idle timeout in seconds for --reactive mode (default 300s / resets on activity)\",\n76:     )\n77:     parser.add_argument(\n78:         \"--loop\",\n79:         action=\"store_true\",\n80:         help=\"Run continuously as a daemon (use with caution)\",\n81:     )\n82:     parser.add_argument(\n83:         \"--poll-interval\",\n84:         type=float,\n85:         default=1.0,\n86:         help=\"Polling interval used by --loop\",\n87:     )\n88:     parser.add_argument(\n89:         \"--no-auto-sync\",\n90:         action=\"store_true\",\n91:         help=\"Do not invoke the controller automatically after ticket transitions\",\n92:     )\n93:     return parser\n94: \n95: \n96: def main() -> int:\n97:     parser = build_parser()\n98:     args = parser.parse_args()\n99:     supervisor = SequentialTicketSupervisor(\n100:         project_root=PROJECT_ROOT,\n101:         auto_sync=not args.no_auto_sync,\n102:     )\n103: \n104:     if args.reactive:\n105:         supervisor.bootstrap()\n106:         state = supervisor.load_state()\n107:         print(\n108:             f\"[ticket-supervisor] reactive mode start | active={state.active_ticket or 'NONE'} \"\n109:             f\"| completed={len(state.completed_tickets)} | timeout={args.timeout}s\",\n110:             flush=True,\n111:         )\n112:         supervisor.run_reactive(timeout_seconds=args.timeout)\n113:         return 0\n114: \n115:     if args.loop:\n116:         supervisor.bootstrap()\n117:         state = supervisor.load_state()\n118: poll={args.poll_interval}s\",\n121:             flush=True,\n122:         )\n123:         supervisor.run_loop(poll_interval=args.poll_interval)\n124:         return 0\n125: \n126:     supervisor.bootstrap()\n127:     state = supervisor.load_state()\n128:     print(\n129:         f\"[ticket-supervisor] once mode start | active={state.active_ticket or 'NONE'} \"\n130:         f\"| completed={len(state.completed_tickets)}\",\n131:         flush=True,\n132:     )\n133:     changed = supervisor.run_once()\n134:     if changed:\n135:         print(\"[ticket-supervisor] once mode
