â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€\n105: \n106: \n107: def sha256(path: Path) -> str:\n108:     h = hashlib.sha256()\n109:     h.update(path.read_bytes())\n110:     return h.hexdigest()\n111: \n112: \n113: def load_json(path: Path) -> dict:\n114:     if path.exists():\n115:         try:\n116:             return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n117:         except Exception:  # noqa: S110\n118:             pass\n119:     return {}\n120: \n121: \n122: def save_json(path: Path, data: dict) -> None:\n123:     path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n124:     path.write_text(json.dumps(data, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n125: \n126: \n127: def collect_files(root: Path) -> list[Path]:\n128:     result = []\n129:     for p in root.rglob(\"*\"):\n130:         if any(part in IGNORE_DIRS for part in p.parts):\n131:             continue\n132:         if p.suffix in EXTENSIONS and p.is_file():\n133:             result.append(p)\n134:     return sorted(result)\n135: \n136: \n137: def rel(path: Path) -> str:\n138:     \"\"\"Ruta relativa desde PROJECT_ROOT como string con forward slashes.\"\"\"\n139:     project_root = _project_root()\n140:     try:\n141:         return path.relative_to(project_root).as_posix()\n142:     except ValueError:\n143:         return path.as_posix()\n144: \n145: \n146: # â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€\n147: # ExtracciÃ³n Python (AST)\n148: # â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€â\"€\n149: \n150: \n151: def extract_py_links(path: Path) -> list[str]:\n152:     \"\"\"Extrae imports y referencias de un archivo .py.\"\"\"\n153:     links = []\n154:     try:\n155:         tree = ast.parse(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n156:         for node in ast.walk(tree):\n157:             if isinstance(node, ast.Import):\n158:                 links.extend(alias.name.split(\".\")[0] for alias in node.names)\n159:             elif isinstance(node, ast.ImportFrom) and node.module:\n160:                 links.append(node.module.split(\".\")[0])\n161:     except Exception:  # SequentialTicketSupervisor,\n300:     review: ReviewBridge,\n301:     manager_path: Path | None,\n302:     timeout: int,\n303: ) -> bool:\n304:     supervisor.reconcile_state()\n305:     ticket_id, current_state, latest_sequence = _ticket_state(supervisor)\n306:     if not ticket_id:\n307:         return False\n308:     if current_state != TicketState.READY_FOR_REVIEW:\n309:         return manager_executable = _resolve_manager_executable(manager_path)\n317:         result = review.run_manager_review_cycle(\n318:             ticket_id=ticket_id,\n319:             supervisor=supervisor,\n320:             manager_executable=manager_executable,\n321:             timeout_seconds=timeout,\n322:         )\n323:     except FileNotFoundError as exc:\n324:         print(f\"[manager-review-bridge] {exc}\")\n325:         return False\n326:     except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:\n327:         print(f\"[manager-review-bridge] Manager review timed out for {ticket_id}\")\n328:         return False\n329:     except ValueError as exc:\n330:         print(f\"[manager-review-bridge] Invalid transition: {exc}\")\n331:         return False\n332:     supervisor.sync_controller(\"--force\")\n333:     checkpoint_sequence = _sync_ticket_checkpoint(\n334:         supervisor=supervisor,\n335:         ticket_id=ticket_id,\n336:         minimum_sequence=latest_sequence,\n337:     )\n338:     _record_review(\n339:         supervisor=supervisor,\n340:         ticket_id=ticket_id,\n341:         decision=result.decision.value.upper(),\n342:         feedback=result.feedback,\n343:         source=\"manager backend exec review\",\n344:     )\n345: \n346:     bridge_state.last_processed_sequence = checkpoint_sequence\n347:     bridge_state.last_ticket_id = ticket_id\n348:     bridge_state.last_ticket_state = current_state.value\n349:     _save_state(bridge_state)\n350:     return True\n351: project_root = _project_root()\n363:     supervisor = SequentialTicketSupervisor(project_root=project_root, auto_sync=True)\n364:     review = ReviewBridge(event_bus=supervisor.event_bus, {"type":"text","timestamp":1779894722494,"sessionID":"ses_196034e76ffeeDFNf1q2oARzaq","part":{"id":"prt_e69fe1ac1001WJlgrLRu5q185k","messageID":"msg_e69fdaaee001o9LI1nrz1XbRGC","sessionID":"ses_196034e76ffeeDFNf1q2oARzaq","type":"text","text":"## SUMMARY\nQuality gates are reported green, but the implementation still misses the CLI root-precedence contract and includes out-of-scope changes.\n\n## BLOCKERS\n- `scripts/manager_review_bridge.py:284-362` accepts `--project-root`, but `_PROJECT_ROOT = resolve_project_root()` is computed at import time before `main()` exports `AGENT_PROJECT_ROOT`. The flag is therefore ignored. Move root resolution until after CLI parsing or defer imports until the env var is set.\n- `scripts/launch_agent_terminals.ps1:365-385` is changed but not listed in `Files Likely Touched`, so the ticket exceeded the approved scope. Revert this change or amend the plan/whitelist before approval.\n\n## SUGGESTIONS\n- Add a regression test covering `manager_review_bridge.py --project-root ...` to prove the injected workspace wins.\n\nDECISION: CHANGES","time":{"start":1779894721217,"end":1779894722491},"metadata":{"openai":{"itemId":"msg_0e8d4de36f7e8d55016a1709917d688191ac2493b870db8aae","phase":"final_answer"}}}}
